name: ERPSMART Builder Publish Rollback Manifest Contract
purpose: Define the future rollback manifest required before any Builder publish runtime writes.

file_backup_strategy.created_files: Record created paths so rollback can remove generated files when safe.
file_backup_strategy.modified_files: Record pre-publish hashes and backups before writing replacements.
file_backup_strategy.deleted_files: Record backups and restore instructions before deletion is allowed.

database_rollback_strategy.created_tables: Record generated tables and down/compensating migration plan.
database_rollback_strategy.modified_tables: Record schema changes and data retention risks.
database_rollback_strategy.limitations: Data created after publish may not be safely removable.

route_menu_permission_rollback_strategy: Record route names, menu entries, permissions, policies, and cache rebuild requirements affected by publish.
cache_rollback_strategy: Prefer targeted cache invalidation or cache rebuild over attempting to restore volatile cache values.
rag_vector_search_index_rollback_notes: Record affected search indexes, vector indexes, and RAG manifests; indexes are derived and should be rebuildable.
limitations: Database rollback may require explicit down migrations or compensating migrations.
Media and business data require retention policy.
Rollback must not be automatic unless a strict future failure mode defines it.
agent_notes: AI Builder Agent may read and summarize a future rollback manifest.
AI Builder Agent must not execute rollback or delete runtime data.
